mapper.sql: coachId, userId,headImgUrl, grade, coachName, phone, sex, province, city, zone, identity, employTime, identImgUrl, diplomaImgUrl, storeId, level,approveStatus,approveTime,approveResult, minClassMoney, classCount, introduce, createdDate
mapper.select: select coachId, userId, headImgUrl,grade, coachName, phone, sex, province, city, zone, identity, employTime, identImgUrl, diplomaImgUrl, storeId, level,approveStatus,approveTime,approveResult, minClassMoney, classCount, introduce, createdDate from coach where coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into coach (coachId, userId,headImgUrl, coachName, phone, sex, province, city, zone, identity, employTime, identImgUrl, diplomaImgUrl, storeId, level, approveStatus,approveTime,approveResult,minClassMoney, classCount, introduce, createdDate ) values (#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employTime,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{approveStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} , #{approveResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{minClassMoney,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{classCount,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{introduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into coach
coachId,
userId,
headImgUrl,
coachName,
phone,
sex,
province,
city,
zone,
identity,
employTime,
identImgUrl,
identBackImgUrl,
diplomaImgUrl,
storeId,
level,
approveStatus,
approveTime,
approveResult,
minClassMoney,
classCount,
introduce,
createdDate,
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{employTime,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{identBackImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{approveStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{approveResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{minClassMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{classCount,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{introduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update coach
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zone = #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
identity = #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
employTime = #{employTime,jdbcType=TINYINT},
identImgUrl = #{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
identBackImgUrl = #{identBackImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
diplomaImgUrl = #{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
level = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
approveStatus = #{approveStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
approveTime = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
approveResult = #{approveResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
minClassMoney = #{minClassMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
classCount = #{classCount,jdbcType=TINYINT},
introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update coach set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zone = #{zone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, identity = #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employTime = #{employTime,jdbcType=TINYINT}, identImgUrl = #{identImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, diplomaImgUrl = #{diplomaImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, approveStatus = #{approveStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, approveTime = #{approveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approveResult = #{approveResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, minClassMoney = #{minClassMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, classCount = #{classCount,jdbcType=TINYINT}, introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT c.coachId,c.coachName,cps.grade,c.level,c.classCount, c.headImgUrl, c.introduce FROM coach_place_ship cps LEFT JOIN coach c ON c.coachId = cps.coachId WHERE cps.storeId = #{storeId} and cps.grade=1 ORDER BY c.level DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM coach_place_ship cps LEFT JOIN coach c ON c.coachId = cps.coachId WHERE cps.storeId = #{storeId} and cps.grade=1

SELECT c.approveStatus,c.coachName,c.grade as level,c.coachId,c.approveResult,u.headImgUrl, (select d.description from data_map d where d.idxLabel=2 and d.nextLabel=3 and d.price=c.grade) as introduce FROM coach c LEFT JOIN user_info u ON u.userId = c.userId WHERE c.userId =#{userId}
SELECT grade FROM coach WHERE coachId = #{coachId}
SELECT storeId FROM coach_place_ship WHERE coachId = #{coachId} AND grade <> 2
mapper.update: UPDATE coach SET storeId = #{storeId} WHERE coachId = #{coachId}
mapper.select: SELECT *FROM coach_place_ship WHERE coachId = #{coachId} AND storeId = #{storeId}
SELECT SUM(evLevel) FROM coach_evaluate WHERE coachId = #{coachId}
SELECT concat(money,'') as money,alipay,realName FROM coach_wallet WHERE coachId =#{coachId}
SELECT price FROM data_map WHERE dataMapId = 24

SELECT c.coachId, c.headImgUrl, (select cps.grade from coach_place_ship cps where cps.coachId = c.coachId AND cps.storeId = #{storeId}) as grade, c.coachName, c.level, c.classCount, (select u.userSign from user_info u where u.userId=c.userId limit 1) as introduce FROM coach c WHERE c.coachId = #{coachId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coach_evaluate WHERE coachId = #{coachId}
mapper.update: update coach set headImgUrl = #{headImgUrl} where userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: select u.userSign from user_info u inner join coach c on c.userId=u.userId where c.coachId=#{coachId} limit 1
